name: brahma_jati_weekly_variants
description: 泰國傳統พรหมชาติ 12 生肖出生星期細分（不同星期出生有不同個性、運勢與守護神影響）
note: 每個生肖依出生星期再細分 7 種變體。建議與出生年 + 出生月合併使用，可得到最精準的個性與運勢解讀。

Sunday.meaning_zh: 智慧高、反應快、不吃虧、做事有條理，但與配偶意見常不合
Sunday.meaning_en: High intelligence, quick-witted, rarely loses out, methodical, but often disagrees with spouse.

Monday.meaning_zh: 官運佳、財運好、適合水上或貿易事業，晚年安樂
Monday.meaning_en: Excellent official and financial luck, good for water-related or trading business, peaceful later years.

Tuesday.meaning_zh: 個性剛強、領導力強，但易與人衝突，需注意健康
Tuesday.meaning_en: Strong personality and leadership, but prone to conflict; watch health.

Wednesday.meaning_zh: 聰明機智、善交際、事業多變，適合自由職業
Wednesday.meaning_en: Clever and sociable, career changes often, good for freelance work.

Thursday.meaning_zh: 福氣深厚、貴人多、適合公職或宗教事業
Thursday.meaning_en: Deep fortune, many benefactors, good for government or religious work.

Friday.meaning_zh: 魅力強、異性緣佳，但感情較複雜，需注意桃花劫
Friday.meaning_en: Very charming, strong opposite-sex attraction, but complicated love life; beware romance troubles.

Saturday.meaning_zh: 堅忍不拔、晚年發達，但幼年較辛苦
Saturday.meaning_en: Persevering, success comes later in life, but difficult early years.

Sunday.meaning_zh: 穩重可靠、事業穩定、適合農業或公職
Sunday.meaning_en: Steady and reliable, stable career, good for farming or government work.

Monday.meaning_zh: 財運佳、適合水上或貿易事業，家庭和睦
Monday.meaning_en: Good wealth luck, good for water-related or trading business, harmonious family.

Tuesday.meaning_zh: 個性剛強、領導力強，但易與人衝突
Tuesday.meaning_en: Strong personality and leadership, but prone to conflict.

Wednesday.meaning_zh: 聰明務實、適合商業或技術工作
Wednesday.meaning_en: Intelligent and practical, good for business or technical work.

Thursday.meaning_zh: 福氣深厚、貴人多、晚年安樂
Thursday.meaning_en: Deep fortune, many benefactors, peaceful later years.

Friday.meaning_zh: 溫柔有魅力、家庭幸福，但感情較複雜
Friday.meaning_en: Gentle and charming, happy family, but complicated love life.

Saturday.meaning_zh: 堅忍勤奮、事業穩定，但幼年較辛苦
Saturday.meaning_en: Persevering and hardworking, stable career, but difficult early years.

Sunday.meaning_zh: 威嚴強大、領導力強、事業大成
Sunday.meaning_en: Strong authority and leadership, great career success.

Monday.meaning_zh: 財運佳、適合流動性事業，晚年富貴
Monday.meaning_en: Good wealth, good for mobile business, wealthy later years.

Tuesday.meaning_zh: 個性剛烈、行動力強，但易衝動
Tuesday.meaning_en: Fiery personality, strong action, but impulsive.

Wednesday.meaning_zh: 機智靈活、適合創意或外交工作
Wednesday.meaning_en: Witty and flexible, good for creative or diplomatic work.

Thursday.meaning_zh: 福氣深厚、貴人多、名利雙收
Thursday.meaning_en: Deep fortune, many benefactors, fame and wealth.

Friday.meaning_zh: 魅力強、異性緣佳，但感情較多波折
Friday.meaning_en: Very charming, strong opposite-sex attraction, but complicated love life.

Saturday.meaning_zh: 堅忍不拔、晚年大成，但幼年辛苦
Saturday.meaning_en: Persevering, great success later in life, but difficult early years.

Sunday.meaning_zh: 溫柔聰明、魅力強、事業順利
Sunday.meaning_en: Gentle and intelligent, very charming, smooth career.

Monday.meaning_zh: 財運佳、適合藝術或服務業
Monday.meaning_en: Good wealth, good for arts or service industry.

Tuesday.meaning_zh: 個性活潑、行動力強，但易情緒化

Wednesday.meaning_zh: 機智善交際、適合外交或公關工作
Wednesday.meaning_en: Witty and sociable, good for diplomacy or PR.

Thursday.meaning_en: Deep fortune, happy family, peaceful later years.

Friday.meaning_zh: 魅力極強、異性緣佳、感情豐富
Friday.meaning_en: Extremely charming, strong opposite-sex attraction, rich love life.

Saturday.meaning_zh: 溫和堅忍、事業穩定，但需注意健康
Saturday.meaning_en: Gentle and persevering, stable career, but watch health.

Sunday.meaning_en: Powerful and fortunate, intelligent and charismatic, excellent official career.

Sunday.meaning_en: Passionate and energetic, great career success.

Monday.meaning_en: Good wealth, good for trading or travel business.

Tuesday.meaning_en: Fiery personality, strong leadership, but impulsive.

Sunday.meaning_en: Gentle and artistic, good for creative work.

Monday.meaning_zh: 財運佳、適合服務或藝術行業
Monday.meaning_en: Good wealth, good for service or arts industry.

Wednesday.meaning_en: Witty and sociable, good for PR.

Sunday.meaning_en: Witty and humorous, creative, career changes often.

Monday.meaning_zh: 財運佳、適合貿易或表演事業
Monday.meaning_en: Good wealth, good for trading or performing arts.

source: The Complete Brahma Jati Manual (ตำรา พรหมชาติ ฉบับสมบูรณ์)
